name: tm_accounts_create
description: Create a new financial account under a client. Requires account_type.

name: tm_accounts_get
description: Get a single account record by client ID and account ID.

name: tm_accounts_list
description: List all financial accounts across all clients. Filter by type, status, or carrier name.

name: tm_accounts_update
description: Update an existing account record (partial update).

name: tm_atlas_health
description: Get ATLAS system health status. Executive+ access.

name: tm_atlas_sources_list
description: List ATLAS data sources. Executive+ access.

name: tm_atlas_tools_list
description: List ATLAS tools and their status. Executive+ access.

name: tm_atlas_wires_list
description: List ATLAS wire definitions and execution history. Executive+ access.

name: tm_clients_create
description: Create a new client record. Requires first_name and last_name.

name: tm_clients_get
description: Get a single client record by Firestore document ID. Returns full client data.

name: tm_clients_get_accounts
description: Get all financial accounts for a client. Optionally filter by account type category.

name: tm_clients_get_activities
description: Get activity log for a client (notes, changes, events). Ordered newest first.

name: tm_clients_list
description: List clients with optional status filter and pagination. Ordered by last name ascending.

name: tm_clients_search
description: Search clients by last name prefix. Returns id, name, email, phone, status, account_count.

q.description: Search query (last name prefix, min 2 chars)

name: tm_clients_update
description: Update an existing client record (partial update). Only provided fields are changed.

name: tm_comms_log_call
description: Log a completed call (no outbound dial). Internal record only.

name: tm_comms_send_email
description: Send an email via the TM API comms service. Requires approval.

name: tm_comms_send_sms
description: Send an SMS via the TM API comms service. Requires approval.

name: tm_comms_send_voice
description: Initiate an outbound voice call via TM API. Requires approval.

name: tm_comms_status
description: Check delivery status of a sent communication by SID.

name: tm_communications_get
description: Get a single communication record by ID.

name: tm_communications_list
description: List communication records with optional filters.

name: tm_flow_instance_create
description: Create a new flow pipeline instance. Triggers downstream automations.

name: tm_flow_instance_get
description: Get a single flow instance by ID.

name: tm_flow_instance_update
description: Update a flow instance (advance stage, update status).

name: tm_flow_instances_list
description: List all flow instances with optional filters.

name: tm_flow_my_active
description: Get active flow instances for the current user.

name: tm_flow_pipeline_get
description: Get a flow pipeline definition by key.

name: tm_flow_pipeline_stages
description: Get stages for a flow pipeline.

name: tm_flow_task_update
description: Update a flow task (complete, reassign, add notes).

name: tm_households_get
description: Get a single household record with members list.

name: tm_households_list
description: List all households. Filter by status or assigned user.

name: tm_households_meeting_prep
description: Generate structured meeting prep data for a household — member inventory, financial aggregates, opportunities, action items.

name: tm_notifications_list
description: List notifications for the current user.

name: tm_notifications_mark_read
description: Mark a single notification as read.

name: tm_notifications_read_all
description: Mark all notifications as read for the current user.

name: tm_pipelines_get
description: Get a single pipeline by ID with stage details.

name: tm_producers_get
description: Get a single producer/agent record by ID. Leader+ access.

name: tm_que_quote_add
description: Add a quote to a draft QUE session (no send, no client mutation).

name: tm_que_session_create
description: Create a new QUE quoting session (draft — no external action).

name: tm_que_session_get
description: Get a single QUE session by ID with all quotes.

name: tm_que_session_update
description: Update status/fields on a QUE session — internal only.

name: tm_que_sessions_list
description: List QUE quoting sessions with optional filters.

name: tm_revenue_get
description: Get a single revenue record by ID. Leader+ access.

name: tm_revenue_summary_by_agent
description: Get revenue summary grouped by agent. Leader+ access.

name: tm_search_global
description: Global search across clients, accounts, households, and producers.

name: tm_sprints_create
description: Create a new FORGE sprint. No downstream automation.

name: tm_sprints_get
description: Get a single sprint by ID.

name: tm_tracker_create
description: Create a new tracker ticket. No downstream automation.

name: tm_tracker_get
description: Get a single tracker ticket by ID.

name: tm_tracker_list
description: List all tracker tickets with optional filters.

name: tm_tracker_update
description: Update a tracker ticket (status, assignment, fields).

name: mcp_business_analyze_transcript
description: Analyze a meeting transcript for action items, insights, and follow-ups.

name: mcp_business_calculate_commission
description: Calculate commission for an agent on a policy sale.

name: mcp_business_get_person
description: Look up a person (client, agent, or team member) in the RPI database.

name: mcp_calendar_create_event
description: Create a new calendar event. Requires approval.

name: mcp_calendar_list_events
description: List upcoming calendar events within a time range.

name: mcp_calendar_search_events
description: Search calendar events by keyword across all calendars.

name: mcp_comms_initiate_call
description: Initiate an outbound call via the RPI comms service. Requires approval.

name: mcp_comms_send_email
description: Send a transactional email via the RPI comms service. Requires approval.

name: mcp_comms_send_sms
description: Send an SMS message via RPI comms service. Requires approval.

name: mcp_gdrive_create_doc
description: Create a new Google Doc in Drive with given title and content.

name: mcp_gdrive_get_sheet_content
description: Read the content of a Google Sheet by file ID.

name: mcp_gdrive_list_folder
description: List the contents of a Google Drive folder by folder ID.

name: mcp_gdrive_search
description: Search for files and folders in Google Drive by name or content.

name: mcp_gmail_read_email
description: Read the full content of a specific email by message ID.

name: mcp_gmail_search_emails
description: Search emails in Gmail using Gmail query syntax.

name: mcp_gmail_send_email
description: Send an email via Gmail. Use for any outbound email from JDM or RPI.

name: mcp_healthcare_lookup_npi
description: Look up a healthcare provider by NPI number or name in the NPPES registry.

name: mcp_healthcare_search_codes
description: Search ICD-10 diagnosis or procedure codes by description or code prefix.

name: mcp_healthcare_search_plans
description: Search Medicare Advantage / Part D plans available in a specific county.

name: mcp_slack_get_channel_history
description: Retrieve recent messages from a Slack channel.

name: mcp_slack_post_message
description: Post a message to a Slack channel or DM a user. Requires approval.

name: mcp_slack_search_public
description: Search public Slack messages and channels by keyword.

name: mcp_workspace_execute_script
description: Execute a Google Apps Script function on a GAS project.

name: mcp_workspace_meet_get_transcript
description: Retrieve the transcript from a Google Meet recording.

name: mcp_workspace_send_message
description: Send a Google Chat message to a space or user. Requires approval.

name: create_acf_folder
description: Create an ACF subfolder for a new client or agency. Returns folder ID and link.

name: create_calendar_event
description: Direct calendar event creation with attendees. Wraps google-calendar MCP.

name: get_client_documents
description: List all documents in a client ACF folder. Returns file metadata and Drive links.

name: get_document
description: Retrieve a single document by Drive file ID. Returns content or download URL.

name: list_acf_contents
description: List all files in an ACF folder with metadata. Supports pagination via page_token.

name: log_activity
description: Write an activity log entry to Firestore for audit trail.

name: run_illustration
description: Browser automation on carrier portal (North American + Athene).

name: run_que_quote
description: Execute QUE Medicare quote for a client. Returns plan comparison data.

name: save_to_drive
description: Save content (HTML, PDF, text) to a specified Drive folder. Returns file ID and link.

name: schedule_meeting
description: Create a calendar event and send invites via Google Calendar MCP.

name: send_sms
description: Send SMS via Lead Connector. Requires approval gate before execution — irreversible action.

name: Build Casework
description: User-to-close pipeline: generates casework HTML in ACF with Slack notification.

name: Coverage Gap Analysis
description: Identifies insurance protection deficiencies across life and health coverage.

name: Draft Communication
description: Generates and stores communication templates (email/sms/letter) for client follow-up.

name: Meeting Prep
description: Full preparation materials for client appointments: review packet, documents, and agenda.

name: Pull Documents
description: Retrieves all client documents from ACF folders with metadata and Drive links.

name: Review Prep
description: Compiles complete review packet: client profile, accounts, pipeline status, and summary.

name: RMD Analysis
description: Tax planning analysis for required minimum distributions with withdrawal strategy.

name: Run Illustration
description: Browser automation on carrier portals for illustration PDF generation.

name: AEP Enrollment
description: Annual Enrollment Period preparation: client review, coverage gap analysis, enrollment communication draft, and scheduled follow-up meeting. AEP blackout (Oct 1 – Dec 7) blocks communications automatically.

name: Annual Review
description: Full annual review preparation: review packet, client documents, meeting prep with agenda, and draft follow-up communication. Approval gate pauses before sending communication.

name: New Business
description: New business pipeline: review prep for prospect, casework generation with QUE quotes and interactive HTML, and meeting scheduling. Approval gate pauses before committing casework.

name: Onboard Agency
description: New agency onboarding: gather agency data via review prep, retrieve and organize ACF documents, and prepare folder structure for the new agency relationship.
